title: Glass Hearth
public_claim: The Glass Hearth is a MuranoOS room for building culinary judgment, not a recipe app.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
use_value: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Glass Hearth, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.

component_proofs.claim_supported: The Glass Hearth is a MuranoOS room for building culinary judgment, not a recipe app.
component_proofs.input: source packet, code-ready room description, scope, and intended runtime
component_proofs.expected_output: bounded definition of what the handoff asks a builder to construct
component_proofs.current_evidence: Expected proof artifact: bounded definition of what the handoff asks a builder to construct
component_proofs.verification_check: Open or inspect the local runtime path for Glass Hearth Handoff Identity; confirm a room, action, or state record traces to the governing contract.
